base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of footer_signature_block — a ui from 1980 pac man. Attribution footer — 'PAC-MAN COMPLETE SPRITE SHEET WITH ALL PALETTES RIPPED AND SORTED BY CAYI1E USING ORIGINAL ASSETS MADE BY NAMCO' on magenta background + small glyph-palette reference swatch. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Attribution footer — 'PAC-MAN COMPLETE SPRITE SHEET WITH ALL PALETTES RIPPED AND SORTED BY CAYI1E USING ORIGINAL ASSETS MADE BY NAMCO' on magenta background + small glyph-palette reference swatch
